title: Elevate UI Readability: Master CSS "hyphens" for Perfect Text Flow and Consistent Layouts
tweet: Improve your web typography! 🚀 Discover how CSS 'hyphens' can transform text flow, prevent awkward breaks, and create visually consistent layouts for a superior #UI design. #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UserExperience
tip: To enhance text readability and maintain consistent line lengths in justified or narrow columns, judiciously apply the 'hyphens' CSS property. Combine 'hyphens: auto;' with a correctly set HTML 'lang' attribute for language-specific hyphenation rules and consider 'hyphenate-limit-chars' for fine-grained control, preventing overly short word fragments at line breaks.
